title: Insurance Underwriter
description: Morgan Stanley is seeking an Insurance Underwriter for our Raleigh office to assess risk, evaluate insurance applications, and make underwriting decisions for commercial insurance products. You will review medical records, financial documentation, and claim history to determine insurability and premium pricing.
responsibilities: Review insurance applications and supporting documentation for completeness
Assess risk factors and determine insurability of applicants
Order and interpret medical reports and financial statements
Make underwriting decisions within company guidelines
Prepare underwriting decisions and communicate with brokers
Maintain accurate underwriting files and case notes

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or related field
skills: Understanding of insurance products and underwriting guidelines
certifications: Property and Casualty Insurance license preferred
CLU or CPCU candidate a plus

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Hybrid work arrangement and commuter benefits
